rulings.Case Title: KARIM H. TAHIR VS. JIMMY BUDIHALIM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, November 06, 2015, Line 1. (Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT JIMMY BUDIHALIM Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs is OFF CALENDAR, Amended Notice of Motion filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KARIM H. TAHIR VS. JIMMY BUDIHALIM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant And Cross Complainant Jimmy Budihalims Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, November 06, 2015, Line 1 (Part 2 of 2). DEFENDANT JIMMY BUDIHALIM Defendant And Cross Complainant Jimmy Budihalims Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs is GRANTED, in part and DENIED in part. Motion for attorney's fees is granted against Karim and Liana Tahir in the total amount requested. Motion for Costs is denied without prejudice. Memorandum of Costs has been served on a deceased counsel and this Court has previously found that such service is insufficient. Memorandum of Costs shall be re-served. Motion for attorney's fees and costs is denied with prejudice as to Tara Tahir to the extent the motion is directed to her. See Amended Notice of Motion 1: 27-28. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE MARIE ANNUZZI et al VS. HENRY FONG PAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, November 06, 2015, Line 2 (Part 1 of 2). DEFENDANT HENRY PAN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is denied. Multiple triable issues of fact regarding each issue subject to summary adjudication and summary judgment, including but not limited to 11, 12, 13, 21, 66, 181, 262, 286, 395, 1008. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE MARIE ANNUZZI et al VS. HENRY FONG PAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, November 06, 2015, Line 2 (Part 2 of 2). PLAINTIFF JOANNE ANNUZZI, OSVALDO MARTINEZ Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint is granted for Plaintiff to add a cause of action under SFRO 37.9(f). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN SMYTH AND BEN HUTCHINSON VS. ANNE KIHAGI
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, November 06, 2015, Line 4. DEFENDANT ZORIALL LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiffs have alleged facts sufficient to support each cause of action. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ARC LIGHT COMPANY, LP VS. ROBERT BROWN-MILLER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, November 06, 2015, Line 5. DEFENDANT ROBERT BROWN-MILLER Demurrer By Defendant Robert Brown-Miller is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer under CCP 1161(1). Whether Defendant is a tenant subject to protections of SFRO is an issue of fact not properly raised on demurrer. =(501/REQ)
